label: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 19

extraction.one_line_summary: CORT Magnus won from a 7-man break after SIMMONS Quinn attacked early but NIELSEN's lead-out timing beat OLIVEIRA's pure sprint speed by half a wheel.
tactical_patterns: OLIVEIRA Rui attacked early in 18-rider break to eliminate non-sprinters but paradoxically weakened himself for final sprint.
BikeExchange and DSM refused cooperation until final 8km, ensuring break survived by maintaining 30-second inefficient chase buffer.
SIMMONS Quinn forced to launch solo attack knowing sprint disadvantage, but break's cat-and-mouse delayed until final kilometers negated.

rider_signals.CORT Magnus: positive: Third stage win despite EF depleted to skeleton team after losing three riders including GC leader CARTHY
rider_signals.OLIVEIRA Rui: negative: Attacked to shed break passengers as fastest sprinter but burned matches that cost him the win
rider_signals.SIMMONS Quinn: neutral: Correctly read sprint disadvantage and went long but lacked firepower to hold off organized lead-out
rider_signals.MENKES Louis: negative: Top-10 GC bid ended by crash in peloton compression during disorganized BikeExchange-DSM chase coordination
rider_signals.DENZ Nico: negative: DSM chased own breakaway rider rather than committing to his chances in quality 18-rider group
